title: Activation Functions Path
description: Build fluency in Activation Functions inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Additive Margin Softmax (AM-Softmax)
steps.summary: ** Additive Margin Softmax (AM-Softmax) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Activation Functions. It sits inside Neural Networks / Activation Functions. Start after Softmax and Softmax Function.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
